items.name_en: .🌷【New】GG Kids Animal Print Tote. The 2024 Early Spring Kids collection artfully blends circular interlocking GG and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. White and beige Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas trim, Gucci animal print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:

This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. Model: 605614.
Dimensions: 25(L) x 28.5(W) x 11cm(T)cm
Color: Peter Rabbit/Light Blue.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: .🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
items.name_cn:
.🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This medium tote is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap.
Model: 815716.
Size: 32(L) x 17(H) x 10cm(D).
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: .🌷With full original green box packaging🌷[New] GG Children's Animal Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Series ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative concept of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with Gucci animal prints, cleverly incorporating white contrast piping, showcasing design ingenuity. White and cream Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas piping, Gucci animal print designed by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: .💓【Imported original leather with full packaging】GG Marmont Messenger Bag Series 💕
items.name_cn:
.💓【Imported original leather with full packaging】GG Marmont Messenger Bag Series 💕
Model: 547260 Size: 21*15*8cm
GG Marmont's popularity has never stopped. There is no better-looking messenger bag. Double G stitching mini handbag, shoulder bag, crossbody chain bag. Classic double G logo, heart design on the back adds a girlish cute atmosphere. Handbag design allows you to have different carrying methods!

items.name_en: .💖[Full set of original green packaging]💖
items.name_cn:
.💖[Full set of original green packaging]💖
Gucci New Arrival Introduction: Immersed in retro sentiment, the Ophidia family welcomes a new member—a medium tote bag. The square shape evokes retro design. The GG high-quality canvas is embellished with red and green webbing, the brand's most distinctive classic elements, paying tribute to the brand's equestrian origins. Ophidia Web
Model: 503876.
Size: 32.5*20*10cm.
Color: Brown/pvc.

items.name_en: .💖[Full set of original green packaging]💞Small GG shoulder bag. The GG pattern is reinterpreted every season, accumulating decades of rich heritage. This symbol not only represents the initials of the brand's founder but also subtly pays tribute to the Gucci houndstooth pattern originating from the 1930s. By merging different eras of Gucci's history, this pattern honors the brand's origins while innovating. This black small shoulder bag features an interlocking letter pattern. Hidden Details · Black embossed GG leather · Gold-tone hardware · As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology to help verify authenticity and enjoy a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen lining · Inside: 1 zip pocket · Handle height: 15cm · Detachable shoulder strap (30cm high) · Double G and rivet lock · Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
